name: Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc.
description: Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc. is an integrated healthcare, pharmacy, and retail leader with a rich heritage of caring for communities. As a multinational holding company, it operates through various segments, including Retail Pharmacy USA and International, providing essential pharmacy services, health and wellness products, and retail goods. With thousands of locations and a vast team of healthcare professionals, the company is dedicated to improving health outcomes and simplifying operations to elevate customer experiences. Headquartered in the United States, it remains a cornerstone of community health, serving millions of patients and customers daily across its extensive network.
